name: details: same-day check-in and check-out re-prompts on an overnight booking — zero nights is not a stay (B7/F15)
comment: The overnight defaults would make this 14:00 to 10:00 on the same SAST day: a negative-length stay. Distinct from the reversed case only in that compareYmd returns 0 rather than negative, which is why the guard is '<= 0' and not '< 0'. Note this is an Overnight-flow rule: B9's hourly bookings are same-day by definition and will need their own duration check rather than reusing this one.

includes: Sorry, I didn't quite get that
